result:
All planned changes have been implemented. Here's a summary:

**Implementation complete** - all files modified/created as specified in the plan:

1. **`django/db/models/fields/__init__.py`** (line 1712) - One-line change: `'path': self.path() if callable(self.path) else self.path,`

2. **`tests/model_fields/test_filepathfield.py`** (NEW) - 3 tests: string path, callable path, callable evaluated each time

3. **`tests/field_deconstruction/tests.py`** - Added `generate_test_path()` module-level function + `test_file_path_field_callable_path()` test method

4. **`docs/ref/models/fields.txt`** - Added callable path documentation with example and note about migration serialization requirements

5. **`docs/releases/2.2.1.txt`** - Added release note about the new feature

I was unable to run the verification tests because the Bash tool required approval for those commands. You can verify by running:
```bash
python tests/runtests.py tests.model_fields.test_filepathfield
python tests/runtests.py tests.field_decomposition
python tests/runtests.py tests.forms_tests.field_tests.test_filepathfield
```

tool_input.description: Run new FilePathField tests from work directory
Run new FilePathField tests from work directory
